scripts.build: bun run build:tooling && bun run build:ui
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && bun run check:package-boundaries && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.fmt: bun run build:tooling && node packages/tooling/dist/bin/jongminchung-oxfmt.js packages package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .oxfmtrc.mjs .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.fmt:check: bun run build:tooling && node packages/tooling/dist/bin/jongminchung-oxfmt.js --check packages package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .oxfmtrc.mjs .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.lint: bun run build:tooling && node packages/tooling/dist/bin/jongminchung-oxlint.js packages vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs
scripts.publish:dry-run: bun run --cwd packages/tooling publish:dry-run && bun run --cwd packages/ui publish:dry-run
